$comment: Controlled vocabulary for the `project_tags` field. Literal project handles (sales-hub, free-oppression, skill-graph) and semantic cross-project tags (ecommerce, shopify-stack, etsy-stack). The workspace config at .skill-graph/config.json maps literal handles to semantic tag sets — a skill tagged with a semantic tag matches every project whose config expands to include that tag. Scope: soft-advisory — skill-lint.js emits WARNING (not error) for unknown tags.
